system.description:
When you **_use words to avoid suspicion or trouble_**, roll +CHA: **on a 10+**, hold 3 Nerve; **_on a 7-9_**, hold 1 Nerve. You may spend Nerve, 1-for-1, to:

- Move about or maneuver unchallenged
- Withstand direct scrutiny or questioning
- Direct suspicion or attention elsewhere
